blockers.detail: Core P1 gate intentionally declares ui_full_operation_pending=true and p1_full_operation_gate_status=blocked.
UI route/render tests are fixture-backed. Desktop bridge smoke uses fake/injected runner; no real large local user workflow was executed.
Some actions remain planned_adapter, provider_required, secret_required, or mock_only and must not be marked ready.

remaining_risks: GitHub Actions reported Node.js 20 deprecation and windows-latest redirection notices; not a P1 behavior failure, but CI workflow maintenance is upcoming.
Core safety grep broad pattern has many expected documentation/test hits; high-entropy secret-like scan found no hits.
UI Flutter builds generated local build artifacts, but they are ignored and not committed.
recommendation: Keep P1 Integrated Gate blocked until full-operation UI workflows are wired to real safe Core execution paths and planned adapters are no longer blocked. Do not start v4.0 or mark v4 release.
